heading: Custom-built web software, designed and shipped end to end.
paragraphs: WesDev is the studio of Wesley — a developer who turns rough ideas into **production-grade websites and web apps**. Every build starts from a blank file: no page builders, no bloated templates, just clean architecture and code the next engineer can actually read.

I care about the unglamorous parts that make a site last: **fast load times, accessible markup, sane state management,** and SEO that earns real traffic. Design and engineering live under one roof, so the interface you sign off on is the interface that ships.
From first wireframe to the last deploy, you work directly with the person writing the code — **no hand-offs, no surprises.**
imageAlt: Portrait of Wesley, founder of WesDev
